query:
INSERT INTO rssSources (id, name, feedUrl, category, isActive) VALUES
(180001, 'Process Online Australia', 'https://www.processonline.com.au/feed/', 'industrial_maintenance', 1),
(180002, 'Water World', 'https://www.waterworld.com/feed/', 'water_utilities', 1),
(180003, 'Plant Services', 'https://www.plantservices.com/feed/', 'industrial_maintenance', 1),
(180004, 'Australian Water Association', 'https://www.awa.asn.au/AWA/News/AWA/News/News.aspx?rss=1', 'water_utilities', 1),
(180005, 'Australasian Corrosion Association', 'https://www.corrosion.com.au/feed/', 'coatings', 1),
(180006, 'Maintenance Technology', 'https://www.maintenancetechnology.com/feed/', 'industrial_maintenance', 1),
(180007, 'Pumps and Systems', 'https://www.pumpsandsystems.com/rss.xml', 'industrial_maintenance', 1),
(180008, 'Port Technology International', 'https://www.porttechnology.org/feed/', 'infrastructure', 1),
(180009, 'Ports and Harbors', 'https://www.iaphworldports.org/news/rss', 'infrastructure', 1),
(180010, 'Chemical Engineering Australia', 'https://www.chemicalengineering.com.au/feed/', 'industrial_maintenance', 1)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name);
